# Q2 filter+sort — rows over raw exfil floor (data exfil volume)

**Dataset**: `gx_07_flows` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Data-exfiltration by volume — rank egress by bytes moved per host/destination. Q2 filter+sort — rows over raw exfil floor.

```sql
dataset = gx_07_flows | filter bytes_out > 10000000 | sort desc bytes_out
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 10). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
